footer.description: A passionate frontend developer creating modern web experiences.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm Ehsan Jalilvand, a developer passionate about creating. I entered the programming world during university, starting with C# and SQL Server.
A few years later, I wrote my first software with help from my father, who is a civil engineer - a program specialized for civil engineering tasks.
I've always loved building new things and experimenting; it doesn't matter what it is - an app, an airplane model, or even a soil-free plant pot!
I have a great passion for plants and flowers. So much so that many neighbors ask me about their plant problems.
Alongside work and projects, I live with my lovely wife and have a funny, mischievous dog named Fandogh who is an inseparable part of our home.
I love learning new things, building useful tools, and spending time with family and nature.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.subtitle: The tools and technologies I work with

description: Designed real-time data ingestion system using MMTP, processing 2 million+ messages daily.
Built distributed SQL storage for high availability and fast data retrieval.
Developed document submission system with EF Core (Code-First) and RESTful APIs, improving workflow by 30%.
Led redesign of tse.ir website supporting 10,000+ concurrent users using microservices architecture.
Architected custom CMS with IdentityServer4 (OAuth2), Redis caching, RabbitMQ, Clean Architecture & MediatR.
Developed WCF-based CRM synchronization services enabling real-time bidirectional communication.
Enhanced data consistency and integration across multiple financial software systems.
Designed scalable application framework with dynamic column and record-level access control.
Automated CRUD operations and standardized UI using custom user controls.
Developed financial software suite (accounting, payroll, asset management) using WPF & EF Core.
Developed civil engineering software with Windows Forms, SQL Server, and ADO.NET.
Implemented modules for project setup, BOQ management, progress reporting, and cost control.
